serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/data_products
serverInfo.title: data_products
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the data_products service.

tools.name: listDataProducts
tools.title: listDataProducts
tools.description: Returns a list of all available SAP-managed data products in the BDC catalog

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

tools.name: getDataProduct
tools.title: getDataProduct
tools.description: Returns detailed information about a specific SAP-managed data product including its schema, status and usage

tools.name: activateDataProduct
tools.title: activateDataProduct
tools.description: Initiates the activation workflow for an SAP-managed data product, making it available for consumption

tools.name: deactivateDataProduct
tools.title: deactivateDataProduct
tools.description: Deactivates a previously activated SAP-managed data product

tools.name: getDataProductActivationStatus
tools.title: getDataProductActivationStatus
tools.description: Returns the current activation status, replication state and last run time of a data product

tools.name: listActivationJobs
tools.title: listActivationJobs
tools.description: Returns a list of all data product activation and deactivation jobs with their current status

tools.name: getActivationJob
tools.title: getActivationJob
tools.description: Returns detailed status and logs of a specific data product activation job
